accountSwitcher.noAccountLinked: No account linked. Mark a profile as yours below, or link the detected account if the Riot client is open.
accountSwitcher.searchToLink: + Search for a profile to link
accountSwitcher.cycleHint: Ctrl+Tab to cycle through your accounts
accountSwitcher.lossStreakThresholdTitle: Override the loss-streak alert threshold for this account (empty = global setting)

miniOverlay.choosePlayer: Choose a player before switching to mini mode.

updateBanner.title: Update
updateBanner.readyToInstall: A new version of Val Tracker is ready to be installed.

playerNotesPanel.title: Notes
playerNotesPanel.pinLocked: Too many incorrect attempts. Try again in {{seconds}}s.
playerNotesPanel.vlrLinkTitle: Link to a pro VLR profile (optional)
playerNotesPanel.vlrLinkHint: If you know this account belongs to a pro player known on VLR.gg, enter their profile ID here (visible in the URL vlr.gg/player/<id>/...) — automatically cross-referenced in the overlay if this player is detected in a match.
playerNotesPanel.followFriendHint: Notifies you when this player finishes a competitive match (new match detected in their history) — not live presence, which the Henrik API doesn't expose.

step1.title: 1. Henrik API key
step1.description: Needed to query the Henrik Dev API (rank, matches). Join the Henrik Dev Discord to get one (see the README).
step1.placeholder: Paste your Henrik API key here
step1.proxyAvailable: Access without a personal key is already available on this install — you can skip this step.

step2.title: 2. Default region
step2.description: Used for searches and the leaderboard.

step3.title: 3. Automatic match detection
step3.checking: Looking for the local Riot client…
step3.found: Riot client detected — the overlay and match detection will work automatically.
step3.notFound: Riot client not detected for now (no worries, the app falls back to manual search mode) — restart the Riot client then check Settings → Overlay if needed.

accountTimeline.empty: No history yet — come back after a few refreshes and matches played.

recapCardModal.copied: Copied — paste it directly into Discord (Ctrl+V).
recapCardModal.copyUnsupported: Copy not supported here — use "Download" instead.

rankHistoryChart.limitedHistoryBody: Come back to this profile after a few games to see the rank progression curve take shape.

progressionGoalPanel.title: Progression goal
progressionGoalPanel.eta: At this pace, next tier in ~{{days}} day(s)

trackerScoreCard.title: Tracker Score
trackerScoreCard.subtitle: out of {{total}} points
trackerScoreCard.notEnoughData: Not enough cached matches to compute a reliable score — open a few recent matches first.
trackerScoreCard.tooltip: Composite performance rating (tracker.gg-style), compared to rough community benchmarks per rank bracket — a directional indicator, not an exact measurement.

matchNotesPanel.title: Notes on this match
matchNotesPanel.empty: No notes on this match yet.
